LEX_NINJA2_CHARACTER_LEX_NINJA2.cardsMod: Lex Ninja cards now appear in rewards and shops.
LEX_NINJA2_CHARACTER_LEX_NINJA2.descript:
A ninja who deliberately passed by the Lex Ninja Sect. Uses Lexkra to power Ninjutsu and Science Ninja Tools.
Heard the Spire has opened again, so decided to come and give it another try.
Translated by Deepseek in English
LEX_NINJA2_CHARACTER_LEX_NINJA2.goldMono: A billion boxes of dollars, ten thousand blades, a million blades...
LEX_NINJA2_CHARACTER_LEX_NINJA2.title: Lex Ninja
LEX_NINJA2_CHARACTER_LEX_NINJA2.flavor:
A ninja who deliberately passed by the Lex Ninja Sect. Uses Lexkra to power Ninjutsu and Science Ninja Tools.

LEX_NINJA2_CHARACTER_LEX_NINJA2.selectMe: You startled me, I unleash Ninjutsu!
LEX_NINJA2_CHARACTER_LEX_NINJA2.victoryM: Ah, I'm no longer in pain, I'm so happy now!
